calendar.matters:
Petition For Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Sep-06-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Russell Rowan appeared via zoom for Ellen Grisez (petitioner).

Discussion was held in regard to the Chase and Portsmouth accounts, and whether they were opened before the trust was created. Petition for Order confirming trust assets is taken under submission.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

Petition For Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Aug-22-2023 Continued To Sep-06-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
